findings.description: `getAnnotationClass` is a required method of the `Validator` interface (shown in the code example returning `SampleCheck.class`) but is absent from s2 hints. Users asking how to implement or what `getAnnotationClass` does would not be routed to this section via hint matching.
findings.source_evidence: public Class<? extends Annotation> getAnnotationClass() { return SampleCheck.class; } — present in the SampleCheckValidator code block in source

findings.description: s1 is titled "アノテーションの作成" but its content begins with the top-level introduction (3-step process overview, note about modifying existing validators needing only steps 2–3, and the sample requirements). This introductory content belongs to the page-level "バリデータの追加・変更" section in the source (before any h2 heading), not to the "アノテーションの作成" subsection. The mismatch may cause the overview/process content to be unreachable when a user asks about the overall addition procedure.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: introductory paragraphs (「バリデーションに使用するアノテーションとバリデータは…」through「2と3を実施すればよい」and the sample requirements list) appear before the first h2 heading 「アノテーションの作成」. Knowledge file s1 merges all of this under the "アノテーションの作成" title.
